title: AgentShadowIntent
description: Per-frame agent tactical shadow intent. Shadow mode ONLY — agent has NO control authority. Baseline tactical + MPC remain the sole authority.

frame_id.description: Per-frame tick identifier matching the baseline timeline

shadow_mode.description: MUST always be true. Marks this record as non-authoritative shadow output.

model_id.description: Model or provider identifier (e.g. stub_v1, gemini-2.5-pro)

tactical_intent.description: Agent shadow tactical intent — from canonical allowed set ONLY

target_lane.description: Target lane for lane-change intents. 'current' for non-LC intents.

reason_tags.description: Structured reason codes explaining the intent choice

confidence.description: Agent confidence in its tactical intent [0.0 – 1.0]. Set to 0.0 when fallback_to_baseline=True.

timeout_flag.description: True if agent did not respond within the configured timeout budget

validation_status.description: Result of contract validation for this agent response

fallback_to_baseline.description: True when agent timed-out, produced invalid output, or requested a forbidden behavior. Baseline authority is unchanged regardless.

baseline_intent.description: The baseline tactical behavior at this frame (from Stage 3B). Copied for comparison.

agrees_with_baseline.description: True if agent tactical_intent semantically matches the baseline_intent

disagreement_useful.description: True if this disagreement is structurally valid and on a clean contract boundary (null when no disagreement)

not.description: FORBIDDEN: agent output must NOT contain direct speed control fields
